title: Broadcom and VMware Provide Update on Pending Transaction
text: SAN JOSE, Calif. & PALO ALTO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Broadcom Inc. (NASDAQ: AVGO) and VMware, Inc. (NYSE: VMW) today announced their expectation that Broadcom's acquisition of VMware (the “Transaction”) will close soon, but in any event prior to the expiration of their merger agreement. The parties have received legal merger clearance in Australia, Brazil, Canada, the European Union, Israel, Japan, South Africa, South Korea, Taiwan, the United Kingdom, and foreign investment control clearance.
